acceptanceReviewed.criterion: PR template captures qd node id, acceptance criteria, validation commands, evidence paths, completion and audit report paths, platform validation status, residual risks, and DAG or topology changes.
Cross-device and opposite-platform validation fields are clearly marked as applicable only when relevant.
Existing qd workflow docs remain aligned with the template.
Markdown lint and repo hygiene checks pass.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Documentation and PR-template update only; markdownlint, `just check`, and diff hygiene passed.
